title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 245.500 - Form of warrants
text:
245.500.  Form of warrants. — The warrant thus drawn shall be in the following form, and shall be signed by the president of the board of directors and countersigned by the secretary:
(RSMo 1939 § 12566) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 10976; 1919 § 4668; 1909 § 5731
